args.command:
echo "=== Acceptance Criteria Check ===" && \
echo "" && \
echo "1. API.md sections (alphabetical):" && \
grep "^##" ./API.md && \
echo "" && \
echo "2. Function count per module:" && \
echo "   auth: $(grep -c "^-" <(sed -n '/^## auth/,/^## /p' ./API.md | head -n -1))" && \
echo "   billing: $(grep -c "^-" <(sed -n '/^## billing/,/^## /p' ./API.md | head -n -1))" && \
echo "   cache: $(grep -c "^-" <(sed -n '/^## cache/,/^## /p' ./API.md | head -n -1))" && \
echo "   metrics: $(grep -c "^-" <(sed -n '/^## metrics/,/^## /p' ./API.md | head -n -1))" && \
echo "   storage: $(grep -c "^-" <(sed -n '/^## storage/,/^## /p' ./API.md | head -n -1))" && \
echo "   worker: $(grep -c "^-" <(sed -n '/^## worker/,\$p' ./API.md))" && \
echo "" && \
echo "3. Checksum (no trailing newline):" && \
wc -c ./checksum.txt && \
echo "" && \
echo "4. Deprecated/Private functions EXCLUDED check:" && \
echo "   renew_session in API.md? $(grep -c 'renew_session' ./API.md || echo 0)" && \
echo "   reimburse in API.md? $(grep -c 'reimburse' ./API.md || echo 0)" && \
echo "   flush in API.md? $(grep -c 'flush' ./API.md || echo 0)" && \
echo "   batch_enqueue in API.md? $(grep -c 'batch_enqueue' ./API.md || echo 0)" && \
echo "   _hash_password in API.md? $(grep -c '_hash_password' ./API.md || echo 0)" && \
echo "   _audit_log in API.md? $(grep -c '_audit_log' ./API.md || echo 0)" && \
echo "   _internal_tick in API.md? $(grep -c '_internal_tick' ./API.md || echo 0)" && \
echo "   _validate_bucket in API.md? $(grep -c '_validate_bucket' ./API.md || echo 0)" && \
echo "   _retry in API.md? $(grep -c '_retry' ./API.md || echo 0)"
